name: UI Component Library Development
description: UX-first component development: Design UX → Implement UI → Test Accessibility

steps.description: Design component UX: user flows, wireframes, states, accessibility
steps.exit_criteria: Component UX designed with all states and accessibility requirements documented

steps.description: Implement React component following UX specifications
steps.exit_criteria: Component implemented with all variants, responsive, and unit tested

steps.description: Test accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) and responsive behavior
steps.exit_criteria: Component passes WCAG 2.1 AA and works across breakpoints

success_criteria: Component is accessible, responsive, and ready for production use
